languages.text: Стало известно, что Себериан отправился на поиски неких артефактов, способных "спасти династию". Вместе со своим реликварным клинком он сгинул где-то в кластере систем, состоящем из Врата Смелых, Игнис Корона и Слеза Солара.

It has become known that Seberian set out in search of certain artefacts allegedly capable of saving the dynasty. Taking his relic sword with him, the Rogue Trader went missing somewhere in the cluster encompassing the Tear of Solar, Ignis Corona, and Fortis Porta systems.
languages.original_text: Стало известно, что Себериан отправился на поиски неких артефактов, способных "спасти династию". Вместе со своим реликварным клинком он сгинул где-то в кластере систем, состоящем из Врата Смелых, Игнис Корона и Слеза Солара.

traits.locale_text: It has become known that Seberian set out in search of certain artefacts allegedly capable of saving the dynasty. Taking his relic sword with him, the Rogue Trader went missing somewhere in the cluster encompassing the Tear of Solar, Ignis Corona, and Fortis Porta systems.

It has become known that Seberian set out in search of certain artefacts allegedly capable of saving the dynasty. Taking his relic sword with him, the Rogue Trader went missing somewhere in the cluster encompassing the Oculus Ignis, Sanctum of Taaphetus, and Nephritis Dominium systems.
It seems the legendary Seberian von Valancius went missing in the very region marked on the discovered map. This clue could be the start of an investigation into his mysterious disappearance.

It has become known that Seberian set out in search of certain artefacts allegedly capable of saving the dynasty. Taking his relic sword with him, the Rogue Trader went missing somewhere in the cluster encompassing the Tear of Solar, Ignis Corona, and Fortis Porta systems.

It has become known that Seberian set out in search of certain artefacts allegedly capable of saving the dynasty. Taking his relic sword with him, the Rogue Trader went missing somewhere in the cluster encompassing the Oculus Ignis, Sanctum of Taaphetus, and Nephritis Dominium systems.

languages.text: 伝説のシベリア・フォン・ヴァランキウスが発見された地図に記された地域で消息を絶ったらしい。この手がかりが彼の謎の失踪の調査の始まりとなるかもしれない。
languages.original_text: It seems the legendary Seberian von Valancius went missing in the very region marked on the discovered map. This clue could be the start of an investigation into his mysterious disappearance.

traits.locale_text: 伝説のシベリア・フォン・ヴァランキウスが発見された地図に記された地域で消息を絶ったらしい。この手がかりが彼の謎の失踪の調査の始まりとなるかもしれない。

languages.text: Ha salido a la luz que Seberian partió en busca de unos artefactos supuestamente capaces de salvar a la dinastía. Junto con su espada reliquia, el Comerciante Independiente desapareció en algún punto del cúmulo que comprende los sistemas de Lágrima de Solar, Ignis Corona y Fortis Porta.
languages.original_text: It has become known that Seberian set out in search of certain artefacts allegedly capable of saving the dynasty. Taking his relic sword with him, the Rogue Trader went missing somewhere in the cluster encompassing the Tear of Solar, Ignis Corona, and Fortis Porta systems.

traits.locale_text: Ha salido a la luz que Seberian partió en busca de unos artefactos supuestamente capaces de salvar a la dinastía. Junto con su espada reliquia, el Comerciante Independiente desapareció en algún punto del cúmulo que comprende los sistemas de Lágrima de Solar, Ignis Corona y Fortis Porta.

languages.text: Es wurde bekannt, dass sich Seberian auf die Suche nach Artefakten gemacht hatte, die angeblich in der Lage waren, die Dynastie zu retten. Und so verschwand der Freihändler mit seinem Schwert irgendwo im Cluster der Systeme Träne von Solar, Ignis Corona und Fortis Porta.
languages.original_text: It has become known that Seberian set out in search of certain artefacts allegedly capable of saving the dynasty. Taking his relic sword with him, the Rogue Trader went missing somewhere in the cluster encompassing the Tear of Solar, Ignis Corona, and Fortis Porta systems.

traits.locale_text: Es wurde bekannt, dass sich Seberian auf die Suche nach Artefakten gemacht hatte, die angeblich in der Lage waren, die Dynastie zu retten. Und so verschwand der Freihändler mit seinem Schwert irgendwo im Cluster der Systeme Träne von Solar, Ignis Corona und Fortis Porta.

languages.text: Vous avez appris que Seberian s'était mis en tête de retrouver certains artefacts qu'il pensait capables de sauver la dynastie. Armé de son épée et relique, le libre-marchand a fini par disparaître quelque part entre les systèmes de la Larme de Solar, d'Ignis Corona et de Fortis Porta.
languages.original_text: It has become known that Seberian set out in search of certain artefacts allegedly capable of saving the dynasty. Taking his relic sword with him, the Rogue Trader went missing somewhere in the cluster encompassing the Tear of Solar, Ignis Corona, and Fortis Porta systems.

traits.locale_text: Vous avez appris que Seberian s'était mis en tête de retrouver certains artefacts qu'il pensait capables de sauver la dynastie. Armé de son épée et relique, le libre-marchand a fini par disparaître quelque part entre les systèmes de la Larme de Solar, d'Ignis Corona et de Fortis Porta.

languages.text: 据悉，塞贝里安曾出发去寻找某些据说能拯救王朝的造物。行商浪人带着自己的圣剑，就此消失于太阳之泪、烈火之冠和坚垒之门所在的那片星团中。
languages.original_text: It has become known that Seberian set out in search of certain artefacts allegedly capable of saving the dynasty. Taking his relic sword with him, the Rogue Trader went missing somewhere in the cluster encompassing the Tear of Solar, Ignis Corona, and Fortis Porta systems.

traits.locale_text: 据悉，塞贝里安曾出发去寻找某些据说能拯救王朝的造物。行商浪人带着自己的圣剑，就此消失于太阳之泪、烈火之冠和坚垒之门所在的那片星团中。

languages.text: Seberian'ın, hanedanlığı kurtarabileceği iddia edilen bazı eserleri aramak üzere yola çıktığı öğrenildi. Yadigâr kılıcını da yanına alan Hür Tacir; Solar Gözyaşı, İgnis Corona ve Fortis Porta sistemlerini kapsayan kümede bir yerlerde kayboldu.
languages.original_text: It has become known that Seberian set out in search of certain artefacts allegedly capable of saving the dynasty. Taking his relic sword with him, the Rogue Trader went missing somewhere in the cluster encompassing the Tear of Solar, Ignis Corona, and Fortis Porta systems.

traits.locale_text: Seberian'ın, hanedanlığı kurtarabileceği iddia edilen bazı eserleri aramak üzere yola çıktığı öğrenildi. Yadigâr kılıcını da yanına alan Hür Tacir; Solar Gözyaşı, İgnis Corona ve Fortis Porta sistemlerini kapsayan kümede bir yerlerde kayboldu.
